name: OZ Minerals
description: OZ Minerals was a prominent Australian-based modern mining company focused on the exploration and extraction of copper, gold, and silver. Headquartered in Adelaide, the company operated significant mining assets and development projects, primarily in Australia and Brazil. Known for its commitment to sustainable mining practices and innovative operational strategies, OZ Minerals played a key role in the global base metals market. In 2023, the company was acquired by BHP, integrating its high-quality copper assets into BHP's global portfolio to support the growing demand for critical minerals in the energy transition.
